---
title: "Intensive Trainings"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Intensive 1-2 day technical workshops"
description: "Fast-track your technical skills with our intensive 1-2 day training workshops designed for busy professionals who need practical, hands-on learning in a condensed timeframe."
from: markdown+raw_html
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:60vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy</div>
    <h1>Intensive<br>Trainings</h1>
    <p>One- and two-day workshops that condense essential skills into focused, hands-on sessions you can apply immediately.</p>
    <a href="#workshops" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">See all workshops</a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- STATS -->
<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">7</div><div class="m-nl">Workshops</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">1–2</div><div class="m-nl">Days each</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">80%</div><div class="m-nl">Hands-on</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">30</div><div class="m-nl">Days post-support</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- WORKSHOP GRID -->
<div class="m-s" id="workshops" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Seven workshops, zero fluff</h2>
    <p class="sub">80% hands-on. Walk out with skills you can use on Monday.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/cybersecurity-essentials/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Cybersecurity Essentials">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 days</div>
              <h3>Cybersecurity Essentials</h3>
              <p>Threat landscape, security controls, and quick wins.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/open-source-contribution/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Open Source Contribution">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 days</div>
              <h3>Open Source Contribution</h3>
              <p>Git essentials, your first PR, and community best practices.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/linux-admin-fundamentals/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="Linux Admin Fundamentals">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 days</div>
              <h3>Linux Admin Fundamentals</h3>
              <p>Command line, users, packages, and basic monitoring.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/data-privacy-compliance/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Data Privacy Compliance">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 days</div>
              <h3>Data Privacy Compliance</h3>
              <p>GDPR, CCPA, data mapping, and breach response planning.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/security-awareness-teams/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Security Awareness">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 day</div>
              <h3>Security Awareness for Teams</h3>
              <p>Social engineering defense, safe habits, and incident reporting.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/cyberhygiene-intensive/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="Cyberhygiene Intensive">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">1 day</div>
              <h3>Cyberhygiene Intensive</h3>
              <p>Device security, authentication, and data protection essentials.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="row g-4 mt-1 justify-content-center">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/trainings/nixos-security-jumpstart/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card">
            <img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/terminal-green.webp" alt="NixOS Security Jumpstart">
            <div class="pg-card-body">
              <div style="font-size:0.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#F5A623; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:0.06em; margin-bottom:0.3rem;">2 days</div>
              <h3>NixOS Security Jumpstart</h3>
              <p>Declarative configuration, hardening, and reproducible environments.</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DELIVERY -->
<div class="m-bg m-bg-stripes" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Built for busy teams</h2>
    <p class="sub">Flexible delivery, lasting impact.</p>
    <div style="max-width:750px; margin:0 auto;">
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-lightning-charge" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Immersive Learning</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">80% hands-on activities with real-world scenarios and collaborative problem-solving.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-geo-alt" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Flexible Delivery</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">In-person at our facilities, on-site at your location, live virtual, or hybrid format.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="up-item">
        <div style="flex-shrink:0; width:48px; height:48px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background:rgba(245,166,35,0.1); border-radius:12px;">
          <i class="bi bi-headset" style="font-size:1.2rem; color:#F5A623;"></i>
        </div>
        <div style="flex-grow:1;">
          <h4 style="margin:0 0 0.15rem;"><span style="color:#fff;">Ongoing Support</span></h4>
          <div class="up-meta">30-day post-training support, reference materials, community forum, and follow-up Q&A.</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- CTA -->
<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Schedule a training<br>for your team</h2>
    <p>Custom workshops with organization-specific scenarios and flexible scheduling.</p>
    <a href="/booking/" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    <div class="m-sm">
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Expert trainers &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Practical focus &nbsp;
      <i class="bi bi-check-circle-fill" style="color:#F5A623;"></i> Team pricing
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
